easy.title: Create Responsive Cards
easy.description: Create 3 cards that are max-width 300px on desktop but shrink to fit the screen on mobile. Cards should be centered and have a minimum height of 150px.

medium.title: Build a Full-Height Hero Section
medium.description: Create a hero section that fills the full viewport height using vh units. Include centered text and test with different viewport sizes. Use min-height to ensure content is always visible even when text wraps.

hard.title: Build a Scrolling Content Area with Constraints
hard.description: Create a fixed-height sidebar with a scrollable content area. The sidebar should have a fixed width of 280px, stretch to full viewport height, and have a scrollable list of items. The main content area should fill the remaining space.
